C) 14,6 D) 12,8
67. Species extinct in the last 500 years due to
over exploitation by humans. (Pg. 265, E)
A) Steller’s sea cow
B) Cichlid fish
C) Passenger pigeon
D) A & C both are correct
68. How many species of cichild fish is extinct
due to introduction of Nile perch in lake
victoria? (Pg. 265, E)
A) 2 B) 20
C) 200 D) 2000
69. The environmental damage caused and
threat posed to our native species by
invasive weed species like. (Pg. 265, E)
A) Carrot grass B) water hycinth
C) lantana D) all of these.
70. African catfish is posing as threat
to the indigenous catfishes. (Pg. 265, E)
A) Parthenium
B) Clarias garlepinus
C) Clarias branchysoma
D) None of these
71. Which one is correct statement about co-
extinction? (Pg. 265, E)
A) When a species become extinct, the
plant and animal species associated
with it in an obligatory way also
become extinct.
B) When a host becomes extinct, it's
unique assemblage of parasites also
meets the same fate
C) In the plant pollinator mutualism,
where extinction of one invariably leads
to the extinction of the other.
D) All these statements are correct.
72. Which one is not an example of Alien
species invasions? (Pg. 265, E)
A) Parthenium
B) Steller’s sea cow
C) Catfish
D) Lantana
73. Purpose of introducing the African cat fish
in the Indian River. (Pg. 265, E)
A) For Aquaculture
B) For ornamental purpose
C) For agriculture
D) None of these.
